meta.title: About Essentia | Our Philosophy & Team
meta.description: Learn about Essentia's philosophy, our expert team, and our commitment to holistic wellness and longevity in Tenerife.

hero.imageAlt: Essentia — interior of the club in Costa Adeje
hero.body: A longevity club in Costa Adeje, Tenerife. Medicine, wellness, and community under one roof.

story.heading: Why we exist.
story.p1: Essentia was founded with one question: what does it actually take to live well for longer? Not in theory, but in practice, every day.
story.p2: We brought together the best of longevity medicine, evidence-based wellness, and genuine human connection, and built a place in the Canary Islands where all three happen under one roof.
story.p3: Membership is not a gym pass. It is access to a medical team, a community of people with the same standards, and the protocols to match.

principles.heading: How we think.
principles.body: Three principles that guide every decision we make, from the protocols we offer to the people we hire.

team.heading: The people.
team.body: A small, expert team. Each person here because they genuinely believe in the work.
team.subheading: Clinicians, coaches, and practitioners united by a shared commitment to evidence-based practice.

cta.heading: The best time to start is now.
cta.body: Membership gives you access to medicine, wellness, community, and education. Choose your tier and begin.
